title: Running Median
hints: Use two heaps: a max heap for the smaller half and a min heap for the larger half.
Maintain balance between the two heaps - the difference in size should be at most 1.
If max heap has more elements, median is the top of max heap.
If min heap has more elements, median is the top of min heap.
When adding a new element, decide which heap it belongs to based on comparison with heap tops.
If heaps become unbalanced (difference > 1), move elements between heaps to maintain balance.
